---
applyTo: "materials/**/slides/*.md"
---

## Slide Asset Instructions

When editing slide outlines or presenter decks:

- Number every slide with a clear title.
- Include speaker notes or presenter guidance for each slide in presenter decks.
- Align slide content to the matching module README and lab.
- Include at least one audience-specific example per major concept (BI, DS, or DE).
- Include a demo or hands-on moment in the middle third of the deck.
- End with validation, reflection, and references slides.
- Enforce markdown lint rules: MD022 (blanks around headings), MD032 (blanks around lists), MD034 (no bare URLs), MD047 (trailing newline).
- Do not skip heading levels.
